'''balulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uvrou|uvrou]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-l-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uvrou|uvrou]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| balulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bælilith|bælilith]] || [[word:bælilij|bælilij]] || [[word:bælilish|bælilish]] || [[word:bælili|bælili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:balululuth|balululuth]] || [[word:balululuj|balululuj]] || [[word:balululush|balululush]] || [[word:balululu|balululu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:baluluth|baluluth]] || [[word:baluluj|baluluj]] || [[word:balulush|balulush]] || [[word:balulu|balulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:balufluth|balufluth]] || [[word:balufluj|balufluj]] || [[word:baluflush|baluflush]] || [[word:balufluf|balufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:baluluthu|baluluthu]] || [[word:baluluju|baluluju]] || [[word:balulushu|balulushu]] || [[word:baluluku|baluluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:baluluth|baluluth]] || [[word:baluluj|baluluj]] || [[word:balulush|balulush]] || [[word:balulu|balulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:baluluthul|baluluthul]] || [[word:balulujul|balulujul]] || [[word:balulushul|balulushul]] || [[word:balulukul|balulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:baluluthuthu|baluluthuthu]] || [[word:balulujuju|balulujuju]] || [[word:balulushushu|balulushushu]] || [[word:baluluku|baluluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:baluluthun|baluluthun]] || [[word:balulujun|balulujun]] || [[word:balulushun|balulushun]] || [[word:balulukun|balulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:baluluthuoro|baluluthuoro]] || [[word:balulujuoro|balulujuoro]] || [[word:balulushuoro|balulushuoro]] || [[word:balulukuoro|balulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
